title: Build FizzBuzz CLI in Go

steps.description: Implement the core FizzBuzz logic encapsulated in the domain layer.
steps.done_condition: Domain functions return expected values for FizzBuzz logic.

steps.description: Define the port interface for the FizzBuzz application.
steps.done_condition: Port interface is defined and ready for use cases.

steps.description: Develop use cases for coordinating FizzBuzz application logic and handling user input.
steps.done_condition: Use case functions execute without errors and interact with the domain model.

steps.description: Create the primary adapter for CLI interaction to get user input and display output.
steps.done_condition: CLI successfully interacts with use cases and produces the correct output.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports first, then use cases, followed by the primary adapter.
successCriteria: FizzBuzz CLI runs successfully printing the correct FizzBuzz output.
Code adheres to hexagonal architecture principles.
